title: AI Research Scientist
story: I joined as the most junior person on the team, and somehow the years have started to add up. Working with real manufacturing data in an industry setting has its own kind of challenge and excitement — quite different from what papers make it look like. I've been working on anomaly detection, time series, and tabular data, and lately I've been expanding into agentic AI systems as well. There's still a long way to go, but that's exactly what makes it interesting.
